mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, summary, content, format, attachments_json, tags_json, gallery_captions_json, link_url, link_title, link_summary, board_id, board_name, category, author, visibility, status, risk_level, is_top, is_featured, created_at, updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = posts.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_favorite pf WHERE pf.post_id = posts.id) AS favorite_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_comment pc WHERE pc.post_id = posts.id) AS comment_count, ( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = posts.id) * 3 + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_favorite pf WHERE pf.post_id = posts.id) * 2 + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_comment pc WHERE pc.post_id = posts.id) ) AS hot_score, (CASE WHEN #{requesterUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follow uf INNER JOIN users u ON uf.target_user_id = u.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{requesterUserId} AND u.username = posts.author ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS follow_score,
(
(CASE WHEN tags_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pTag}, '%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
)
0
AS tag_match_score,
(
( (CASE WHEN title = #{term} THEN 300 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 120 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN tags_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 80 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 40 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 20 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) )
)
0
AS relevance_score FROM posts
status = 'published'
AND author IN ( SELECT u.username FROM user_follow uf INNER JOIN users u ON uf.target_user_id = u.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{requesterUserId} )
AND (
( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') OR tags_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') )
)
AND author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%')
AND tags_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
AND board_id = #{boardId}
AND format = #{format}
AND created_at >= #{dateFrom}
AND created_at <= #{dateTo}
ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY hot_score DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY is_top DESC, is_featured DESC, follow_score DESC, tag_match_score DESC, hot_score DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY hot_score DESC, is_top DESC, is_featured DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY is_top DESC, is_featured DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, title, summary, content, format, attachments_json, tags_json, gallery_captions_json, link_url, link_title, link_summary, board_id, board_name, category, author, visibility, status, risk_level, is_top, is_featured, created_at, updated_at FROM posts WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET status = #{status}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, updated_at = DATE_FORMAT(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE status = #{status} AND updated_at LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%')

SELECT LEFT(created_at, 10) AS date, COUNT(1) AS count FROM posts WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL AND LEFT(created_at, 10) >= #{dateFrom} AND LEFT(created_at, 10) <= #{dateTo} GROUP BY LEFT(created_at, 10) ORDER BY LEFT(created_at, 10) ASC
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(board_name, ''), '未分配板块') AS label, COUNT(1) AS value FROM posts GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(board_name, ''), '未分配板块') ORDER BY value DESC, label ASC LIMIT #{limit}
